text.text:
*345 brands total* (+0 today)
100% have complete profiles (description + image)

:warning: *Suspicious — Third-party URLs (55 brands)*
These brands have `purchase_website` pointing to a marketplace, media article, blog, or aggregator instead of the brand's own domain.
• *Marketplaces / Retailers (14):* BOXKITTY, Soar&Arrow, Matchwood, Tumaz, 奕綸口罩, Uma Hana, URNAVY, KOPER, 姆姆 MUMU, 布物設計 BUWU, Southgate, 淡然有味, 嶼霧茶堂, 金旗山城
• *Price aggregators (11):* Funmay, Gallop Kustom Kulture, JadeGaze, YUE TRAVELER, Desrochers x 曜生活, Miss Luna, 京都奈口金包, CuCare, PICONO Watches, LEEDS WEATHER, 竹云沉香 ZuYun
• *Media / blogs / press (24):* COLORSMITH, HIS 十字架, I.A.N Design, Lisscode, Lotus Fitness, LUCGLE, Mittag Jewelry, Moobulous, MULTI, PhotoFast, Playmetoys, Sudio, VCool, 方粼, Chez。城市系列, 森活小飾, 源作木坊, 月光下友善農場, 烏金報報, 創設小物工作室, One Shoe, Paperself, nsòu, Major Pleasure
• *Social / streaming platforms (4):* odd CIRKUS (Zhihu), 未來居+ (Sohu), 暖木家居 (Threads), Fartech (Douyin)
Full URL table in <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-1057|DEV-1057>.

:warning: *Possible Broken Links (3)*
• `uffy` — stale 2022 blog post URL (https://www.uffy.life/blog/posts/20220825); main site is live
• `fish-bar` — URL has `.php` extension but actual path is `/main`; may 404
• `major-pleasure` — `img.` CDN subdomain used as a search URL; likely mis-copied
:information_source: *Duplicate brand:* "Newstar 明日之星" (`newstar明日之星`) and "NewStar 明日之星" (`newstar`) both point to the same vocus.cc article URL — one should be removed or merged.

*DB Health*
Top tables: `brands` (11 MB), `brand_ai_results` (9.2 MB), `storage.objects` (8.0 MB), `brand_search_results` (7.1 MB), `brand_faq` (5.4 MB)
Connections: 1 active / 23 idle / 0 idle-in-txn — healthy
:warning: *Dead tuples >20% on 7 tables* — all small tables but autovacuum not triggering: `brand_reports` (2100%), `moderation_flags` (800%), `brand_saves` (500%), `brand_submissions` (457%), `curation_jobs` (389%), `curation_job_targets` (220%), `brand_owners` (200%)
Remediation: `VACUUM ANALYZE moderation_flags, brand_reports, brand_saves, brand_owners, curation_job_targets, brand_submissions, curation_jobs;`
Slow queries: top mean 2240ms (admin DO block, single execution — info only; no recurring user-facing slow queries)
